issues: compute_signal does not accept or pass allowed kwargs (country_code, max_results) to fetch_openchargemap_counts
compute_signal uses 'count' column correctly but does not handle empty or insufficient data robustly (e.g. pct_change on small data)
compute_signal logic roughly matches spec intent but uses strict recent_change > prev_change which may be too strict; spec expects detecting accelerating density growth
target_allocations calls fetch_openchargemap_counts again without kwargs, ignoring spec adapter contract
target_allocations uses recent_change * len(universe) as total_change which is not meaningful for position sizing based on rate of change
position sizing logic does not size positions differently per region or stock based on rate of change; it applies uniform weight
signal names RISK_ON/RISK_OFF/HOLD are acceptable but allocation logic does not fully follow spec intent for sizing positions based on rate of change
